tasks.title: Add emit_event() to work-until-done.sh
tasks.description: Add emit_event() function that writes structured stage events to .runs/<feature>_p<phase>.events sidecar file. Call after each stage transition (BRANCH_SETUP, IMPLEMENT, CODE_REVIEW, UAT_REVIEW, PR_CI, DONE).

tasks.title: Add digest assembly to manifest.ts
tasks.description: Add digest: string[] to manifest schema. Add assembleDigest() function that reads sidecar .events file and returns string array for manifest.

tasks.title: Wire digest into ship.ts manifest writing
tasks.description: In shipPhase(), after WUD completes, call assembleDigest() and include result in writeManifest() call.

tasks.title: Add phase-skip logic to ship.ts
tasks.description: When phase arg is omitted and shipping all phases, check each phase in tasks.json. If all tasks are completed or cancelled, skip with log message. Add isPhaseComplete() helper.

tasks.title: Add phase-skip and digest tests
tasks.description: Add unit tests in ship.test.ts for: phase skip on all completed, skip on cancelled+completed, no skip on mixed, digest assembly from events file.

tasks.title: Add failureContext to circuit-break exit
tasks.description: In work-until-done.sh CIRCUIT_BREAK path, write failureContext JSON to state file: openTasks, lastVerdict, iterationTimeline, digest from .events sidecar.

tasks.title: Integrate validate-staging.sh into WUD
tasks.description: Call validate-staging.sh after IMPLEMENT stage completes, before commit/push. On failure, log violation and re-run agent with corrective prompt. On second failure, circuit-break.

tasks.title: Enforce dirty-tree fail-fast in wud-branch.sh
tasks.description: At startup, check git status --porcelain. If non-empty, emit 'Dirty working tree — commit or stash before shipping' to stderr and exit 1.

tasks.title: Add resilience tests
tasks.description: Add E2E tests for: circuit-break state file with failureContext, staging validation rejection triggering corrective re-run, dirty-tree fail-fast.

tasks.title: Update contracts to reflect implementation
tasks.description: Update contracts/ship.md (phase-skip, digest), contracts/implement.md (emit_event, staging), contracts/branch.md (dirty-tree), contracts/wud.md (CIRCUIT_BREAK failureContext).

tasks.title: Rewrite gap-analysis.md
tasks.description: Update gap-analysis.md to reflect current implementation state against the new spec.

tasks.title: Run full test suite and all gates
tasks.description: Run pnpm test, pnpm build, and all gate scripts. Fix any failures.
